---
title: "Survival Analysis: Theory and Advanced Methods"
subtitle: "BIO-002 | Track A — Biostatistics"
description: "The mathematics of time-to-event data: censoring, hazard functions, and the counting process framework that unifies nonparametric, semiparametric, and parametric approaches."
date: "2026-04-11"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
number-sections: true
---

# Survival Analysis: Theory and Advanced Methods

*Content not yet generated.*

Run the generation pipeline and then `src/quarto_export.jl` to populate this page.
